attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  
 SMRSL.BATCH_ID                      
,SMRSL.CREATED_BY                    
,SMRSL.CREATION_DATE                 
,SMRSL.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID        
,SMRSL.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID          
,SMRSL.EMPLOYEE_ID                   
,SMRSL.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,SMRSL.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,SMRSL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,SMRSL.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,SMRSL.LINE_NUM                      
,SMRSL.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID            
,SMRSL.PO_HEADER_ID                  
,SMRSL.PO_LINE_ID                    
,SMRSL.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID           
,SMRSL.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID           
,SMRSL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID           
,SMRSL.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID           
,SMRSL.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID            
,SMRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID              
,SMRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_STATUS_CODE     
,SMRSL.CREATE_DATETIME               
,SMRSL.ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE   
FROM
(
SELECT  
	 BATCH_ID                      
	,CREATED_BY                    
	,CREATION_DATE                 
	,DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID        
	,DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID          
	,EMPLOYEE_ID                   
	,GLOBAL_NAME                   
	,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
	,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
	,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
	,LINE_NUM                      
	,PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID            
	,PO_HEADER_ID                  
	,PO_LINE_ID                    
	,PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID           
	,REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID           
	,REQUISITION_LINE_ID           
	,SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID           
	,SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID            
	,SHIPMENT_LINE_ID              
	,SHIPMENT_LINE_STATUS_CODE     
	,CREATE_DATETIME               
	,ACTION_CODE   
FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES
) SMRSL   
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT NRS,
				$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
			   WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMRSL.GLOBAL_NAME 
				 AND NRS.SK_SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID_INT  = SMRSL.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID
    				 AND NRS.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT 
SRSI.RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY AS  RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY,  
STEXRSL.LINE_NUM AS BK_SHIPMENT_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
ERT.TRANSACTION_DATE AS ACTUAL_RECEIPT_DTM,        
COALESCE(NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_CANCEL_FLG,'N') AS CANCEL_FLG,
COALESCE(NPOL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT, -999) AS LINE_NUM_INT,                     
'UNKNOWN' AS NOTE_TXT,
NRS.RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_KEY AS RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_KEY,
CASE WHEN (NPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='MFG') THEN -99999
	WHEN (NPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='EMEA') THEN -99998
	WHEN (NPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='BV') THEN -99997
	WHEN (NPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='QTC') THEN -99996
	ELSE NPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY
    END  AS  PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY,
COALESCE(DTCWPKEY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, -999) AS DLVR_TO_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,
STEXRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_STATUS_CODE AS RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LN_STATUS_CD,
'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
STEXRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID AS SK_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD,
STEXRSL.ACTION_CODE,
COALESCE(ERT.PRIMARY_QUANTITY,0) as PRIMARY_TRANSACTION_QTY,
COALESCE(ERT.PO_UNIT_PRICE,0.000000) as TRX_UNIT_PRC_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
COALESCE(ERT.CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK')as TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
ERT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE as OVERRIDE_CONVERSION_RT,
ERT.SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY as SOURCE_DOCUMENT_QTY,
COALESCE(ERT.PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,'UNKNOWN') as PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD,
COALESCE(ERT.SOURCE_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,'UNKNOWN') as SRC_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD,
STEXRSL.CREATION_DATE AS RCPT_SHIPMENT_ITM_CREATION_DTM,
CAST(STEXRSL.CREATION_DATE  AS DATE ) AS DV_RCPT_SHIPMENT_ITM_CREATE_DT FROM
	(
	SELECT 
		SMRSLIN.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID,
		SMRSLIN.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SMRSLIN.LINE_NUM,
		SMRSLIN.PO_LINE_ID,
		SMRSLIN.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID,
		SMRSLIN.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID,
		SMRSLIN.SHIPMENT_LINE_STATUS_CODE,
		SMRSLIN.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID,
		SMRSLIN.ACTION_CODE,
             SMRSLIN.CREATION_DATE
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES SMRSLIN
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
		ERSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID,
		ERSL.GLOBAL_NAME,
		ERSL.LINE_NUM,
		ERSL.PO_LINE_ID,
		ERSL.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID,
		ERSL.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID,
		ERSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_STATUS_CODE,
		ERSL.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID,
		ERSL.ACTION_CODE,
             ERSL.CREATION_DATE
	FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES ERSL
	
	) STEXRSL 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXRSL.GLOBAL_NAME )   
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_ITEM SRSI
	ON (SRSI.SK_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID_INT=STEXRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID
     	AND SRSI.SS_CD= NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT NRS
	ON (NRS.SK_SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID_INT  = STEXRSL.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID
    	AND NRS.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT SHIPMENT_LINE_ID,GLOBAL_NAME, TRANSACTION_DATE, PRIMARY_QUANTITY, PO_UNIT_PRICE, CURRENCY_CODE, CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE, SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY, PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, SOURCE_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_RCV_TRANSACTIONS
                 WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'RECEIVE') ERT  
	ON (ERT.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID=STEXRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID
    	AND ERT.GLOBAL_NAME	=STEXRSL.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT NPOLS
	ON (NPOLS.SK_PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID_INT = STEXRSL.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID
		AND NPOLS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
	ON (NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT  = STEXRSL.PO_LINE_ID           
    	AND NPOL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT  EEPAPF.PERSON_ID,EEPAPF.GLOBAL_NAME,NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY    
                        FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F EEPAPF,
                              $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
                        WHERE NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID  =EEPAPF.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER 
						) DTCWPKEY
ON (DTCWPKEY.PERSON_ID=STEXRSL.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID 
    AND DTCWPKEY.GLOBAL_NAME=STEXRSL.GLOBAL_NAME)

SELECT	  RANK () OVER (ORDER	BY STRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID,STRSL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) +MAX_VAL  RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY,
STRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID, STRSL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM	(SELECT	SMRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM	$$STGDB.ST_MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES SMRSL
,  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC   
WHERE	NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME =SMRSL.GLOBAL_NAME        
  union	 all   
SELECT	SCRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES SCRSL,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE	NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME =SCRSL.GLOBAL_NAME  ) STRSL,
(SELECT	COALESCE(MAX (RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY) , 0) MAX_VAL
          FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_ITEM) SRSI 
WHERE	NOT EXISTS ( SELECT	1         
FROM	$$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_ITEM SMRSI  
WHERE	SMRSI.SK_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID_INT = STRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID                 
	AND	SMRSI.SS_CD = STRSL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT 
SRSI.RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY AS  RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY,  
STEXRSL.LINE_NUM AS BK_SHIPMENT_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
ERT.TRANSACTION_DATE AS ACTUAL_RECEIPT_DTM,        
COALESCE(NPOLS.PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_CANCEL_FLG,'N') AS CANCEL_FLG,
COALESCE(NPOL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT, -999) AS LINE_NUM_INT,                     
'UNKNOWN' AS NOTE_TXT,
NRS.RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_KEY AS RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_KEY,
CASE WHEN (NPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='MFG') THEN -99999
	WHEN (NPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='EMEA') THEN -99998
	WHEN (NPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='BV') THEN -99997
	WHEN (NPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='QTC') THEN -99996
WHEN (NPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='CG') THEN -99995
	ELSE NPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY
    END  AS  PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY,
COALESCE(DTCWPKEY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, -999) AS DLVR_TO_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,
STEXRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_STATUS_CODE AS RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LN_STATUS_CD,
'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
STEXRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID AS SK_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD,
STEXRSL.ACTION_CODE,
COALESCE(ERT.PRIMARY_QUANTITY,0) as PRIMARY_TRANSACTION_QTY,
COALESCE(ERT.PO_UNIT_PRICE,0.000000) as TRX_UNIT_PRC_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
COALESCE(ERT.CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK')as TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
ERT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE as OVERRIDE_CONVERSION_RT,
ERT.SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY as SOURCE_DOCUMENT_QTY,
COALESCE(ERT.PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,'UNKNOWN') as PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD,
COALESCE(ERT.SOURCE_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,'UNKNOWN') as SRC_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD,
STEXRSL.CREATION_DATE AS RCPT_SHIPMENT_ITM_CREATION_DTM,
CAST(STEXRSL.CREATION_DATE  AS DATE ) AS DV_RCPT_SHIPMENT_ITM_CREATE_DT FROM
	(
	SELECT 
		SCRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID,
		SCRSL.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SCRSL.LINE_NUM,
		SCRSL.PO_LINE_ID,
		SCRSL.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID,
		SCRSL.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID,
		SCRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_STATUS_CODE,
		SCRSL.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID,
		SCRSL.ACTION_CODE,
             SCRSL.CREATION_DATE
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES SCRSL
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
		ECRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID,
		ECRSL.GLOBAL_NAME,
		ECRSL.LINE_NUM,
		ECRSL.PO_LINE_ID,
		ECRSL.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID,
		ECRSL.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID,
		ECRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_STATUS_CODE,
		ECRSL.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID,
		ECRSL.ACTION_CODE,
             ECRSL.CREATION_DATE
	FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES ECRSL
	
	) STEXRSL 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXRSL.GLOBAL_NAME )   
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_ITEM SRSI
	ON (SRSI.SK_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID_INT=STEXRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID
     	AND SRSI.SS_CD= NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT NRS
	ON (NRS.SK_SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID_INT  = STEXRSL.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID
    	AND NRS.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT SHIPMENT_LINE_ID,GLOBAL_NAME, TRANSACTION_DATE, PRIMARY_QUANTITY, PO_UNIT_PRICE, CURRENCY_CODE, CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE, SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY, PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, SOURCE_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_RCV_TRANSACTIONS
                 WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'RECEIVE') ERT  
	ON (ERT.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID=STEXRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID
    	AND ERT.GLOBAL_NAME	=STEXRSL.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT NPOLS
	ON (NPOLS.SK_PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID_INT = STEXRSL.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID
		AND NPOLS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
	ON (NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT  = STEXRSL.PO_LINE_ID           
    	AND NPOL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT  EEPAPF.PERSON_ID,EEPAPF.GLOBAL_NAME,NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY    
                        FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F EEPAPF,
                              $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
                        WHERE NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID  =EEPAPF.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER 
						) DTCWPKEY
ON (DTCWPKEY.PERSON_ID=STEXRSL.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID 
    AND DTCWPKEY.GLOBAL_NAME=STEXRSL.GLOBAL_NAME)

SELECT SCRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID, SCRSL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SCRSL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SCRSL.CREATION_DATE, SCRSL.CREATED_BY, SCRSL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, SCRSL.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID, SCRSL.LINE_NUM, SCRSL.CATEGORY_ID, SCRSL.QUANTITY_SHIPPED, SCRSL.QUANTITY_RECEIVED, SCRSL.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, SCRSL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION, SCRSL.ITEM_ID, SCRSL.ITEM_REVISION, SCRSL.VENDOR_ITEM_NUM, SCRSL.VENDOR_LOT_NUM, SCRSL.UOM_CONVERSION_RATE, SCRSL.SHIPMENT_LINE_STATUS_CODE, SCRSL.SOURCE_DOCUMENT_CODE, SCRSL.PO_HEADER_ID, SCRSL.PO_RELEASE_ID, SCRSL.PO_LINE_ID, SCRSL.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID, SCRSL.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID, SCRSL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID, SCRSL.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID, SCRSL.ROUTING_HEADER_ID, SCRSL.PACKING_SLIP, SCRSL.FROM_ORGANIZATION_ID, SCRSL.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID, SCRSL.EMPLOYEE_ID, SCRSL.DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE, SCRSL.TO_ORGANIZATION_ID, SCRSL.TO_SUBINVENTORY, SCRSL.LOCATOR_ID, SCRSL.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID, SCRSL.CHARGE_ACCOUNT_ID, SCRSL.TRANSPORTATION_ACCOUNT_ID, SCRSL.SHIPMENT_UNIT_PRICE, SCRSL.TRANSFER_COST, SCRSL.TRANSPORTATION_COST, SCRSL.COMMENTS, SCRSL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, SCRSL.ATTRIBUTE1, SCRSL.ATTRIBUTE2, SCRSL.ATTRIBUTE3, SCRSL.ATTRIBUTE4, SCRSL.ATTRIBUTE5, SCRSL.ATTRIBUTE6, SCRSL.ATTRIBUTE7, SCRSL.ATTRIBUTE8, SCRSL.ATTRIBUTE9, SCRSL.ATTRIBUTE10, SCRSL.ATTRIBUTE11, SCRSL.ATTRIBUTE12, SCRSL.ATTRIBUTE13, SCRSL.ATTRIBUTE14, SCRSL.ATTRIBUTE15, SCRSL.REASON_ID, SCRSL.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE, SCRSL.GOVERNMENT_CONTEXT, SCRSL.REQUEST_ID, SCRSL.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, SCRSL.PROGRAM_ID, SCRSL.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, SCRSL.DESTINATION_CONTEXT, SCRSL.PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, SCRSL.EXCESS_TRANSPORT_REASON, SCRSL.EXCESS_TRANSPORT_RESPONSIBLE, SCRSL.EXCESS_TRANSPORT_AUTH_NUM, SCRSL.ASN_LINE_FLAG, SCRSL.ORIGINAL_ASN_PARENT_LINE_ID, SCRSL.ORIGINAL_ASN_LINE_FLAG, SCRSL.VENDOR_CUM_SHIPPED_QUANTITY, SCRSL.NOTICE_UNIT_PRICE, SCRSL.TAX_NAME, SCRSL.TAX_AMOUNT, SCRSL.INVOICE_STATUS_CODE, SCRSL.CUM_COMPARISON_FLAG, SCRSL.CONTAINER_NUM, SCRSL.TRUCK_NUM, SCRSL.BAR_CODE_LABEL, SCRSL.TRANSFER_PERCENTAGE, SCRSL.MRC_SHIPMENT_UNIT_PRICE, SCRSL.MRC_TRANSFER_COST, SCRSL.MRC_TRANSPORTATION_COST, SCRSL.MRC_NOTICE_UNIT_PRICE, SCRSL.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID, SCRSL.COUNTRY_OF_ORIGIN_CODE, SCRSL.OE_ORDER_HEADER_ID, SCRSL.OE_ORDER_LINE_ID, SCRSL.CUSTOMER_ITEM_NUM, SCRSL.COST_GROUP_ID, SCRSL.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_SHIPPED, SCRSL.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_RECEIVED, SCRSL.SECONDARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, SCRSL.QC_GRADE, SCRSL.MMT_TRANSACTION_ID, SCRSL.ASN_LPN_ID, SCRSL.AMOUNT, SCRSL.AMOUNT_RECEIVED, SCRSL.JOB_ID, SCRSL.TIMECARD_ID, SCRSL.TIMECARD_OVN, SCRSL.OSA_FLAG, SCRSL.REQUESTED_AMOUNT, SCRSL.MATERIAL_STORED_AMOUNT, SCRSL.APPROVAL_STATUS, SCRSL.AMOUNT_SHIPPED, SCRSL.LCM_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID, SCRSL.UNIT_LANDED_COST, SCRSL.GLOBAL_NAME, SCRSL.GES_UPDATE_DATE, SCRSL.BATCH_ID, SCRSL.CREATE_DATETIME, SCRSL.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES   SCRSL

WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT NRS,
				$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
			   WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SCRSL.GLOBAL_NAME 
				 AND NRS.SK_SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID_INT  = SCRSL.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID
    				 AND NRS.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
